name: Baked Zucchine Boats
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Spaghetti sauce, canned (store bought if preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split zucchini lengthwise and scoop out seeds.
2. Saute ground beef, onion, garlic, dill, and parsley in olive oil until the meat is browned. Remove from heat.
3. Add cooked rice, beaten egg, ¼ cup bread crumbs, and mix well.
4. Fill zucchini with the mixture.
5. Place in a baking dish, cover with spaghetti sauce, sprinkle cheese and remaining bread crumbs on top.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for approximately 45 minutes, until zucchini is tender but firm.
